rule: A separate implementation gate and explicit user authorization are required before any execution.
Data ingestion validation must pass and catalyst source timestamps must be recorded before signal evaluation.
No promotion if sign_flip_excluding_top_3 is true or top_3 contribution exceeds 100 percent of total PnL.
No promotion if accepted trade count is below 30 unless report explicitly labels result as exploratory only.
No candidate may be accepted if catalyst timestamp is not observable before entry under source hierarchy.
Proceed to a separate replication spec only if primary metric positive robustness gate passes and catalyst features were frozen before execution.
No paper or live trading from this trial; promotion requires separate promotion gate with larger sample and independent period.
Stop if source timestamps are ambiguous if data gate fails if trial budget exhausted or if post-run validation fails.
